programs.title: Foundations of Islam
programs.subtitle: Essential Knowledge for Every Muslim
programs.description: A comprehensive foundational program designed for new Muslims and those seeking to strengthen their basic Islamic knowledge. Covers the pillars of faith and practice.

programs.title: Scholar Track
programs.subtitle: Advanced Islamic Studies
programs.description: An intensive program for serious students aspiring to become scholars. Deep dive into Islamic sciences with traditional teaching methodologies.

programs.title: Quran Specialist
programs.subtitle: Master the Book of Allah
programs.description: Focus entirely on Quranic sciences - memorization, recitation, understanding, and teaching. For those who want to dedicate themselves to the Quran.

programs.title: Professional Muslim
programs.subtitle: Balance Career and Faith
programs.description: Designed for working professionals who want to grow spiritually without compromising their career. Flexible schedule with online components.

programs.title: Youth Leadership
programs.subtitle: Building Tomorrow's Leaders
programs.description: Empowering Muslim youth with knowledge, character, and leadership skills. Age-appropriate curriculum for teenagers and young adults.
